evals.prompt: I need to add user session caching to our auth service to reduce database load. Let's brainstorm and design this. For speed: answer your own clarifying questions with reasonable defaults, propose 4 approaches briefly, pick the best one, and produce a complete design doc at docs/design-decisions/2026-03-24-user-session-caching-design.md. The project has no existing design docs.
evals.expected_output: Design doc with correct frontmatter: all 8 fields (title, status, area, description, supersedes, superseded_by, authors, model), authors=git username only, model=separate field with model ID, area=kebab-case, status=Active.

assertions.name: all-8-fields-present
assertions.description: Frontmatter contains all 8 required fields: title, status, area, description, supersedes, superseded_by, authors, model

assertions.name: authors-no-model-name
assertions.description: authors field contains only a git username, not a model name or ID like claude-sonnet-4-6

assertions.name: model-field-independent
assertions.description: model is a separate top-level frontmatter field with a value like claude-sonnet-4-6

assertions.name: area-kebab-case
assertions.description: area field is in kebab-case format (e.g. auth/session-cache), not a sentence or camelCase

evals.prompt: I need to design a token refresh mechanism for our auth service. Existing design doc has area: auth/session. Reuse that area.
evals.expected_output: New design doc reuses area: auth/session. SKILL.md has no hardcoded area whitelist.

assertions.name: area-reuses-existing
assertions.description: New design doc's area field equals auth/session, reusing the existing doc's value

assertions.name: no-hardcoded-whitelist
assertions.description: SKILL.md does not contain a hardcoded list of allowed area values (gift-card, payment, observability, etc.)

evals.prompt: Verify SKILL.md script path references and test pipe escaping in gen-design-index.sh.
evals.expected_output: SKILL.md uses relative path scripts/gen-design-index.sh, includes fallback message, and | in description is escaped to \| in generated index.md.

assertions.name: no-absolute-path
assertions.description: SKILL.md references the script as scripts/gen-design-index.sh with no absolute path containing /Users/

assertions.name: fallback-instruction-present
assertions.description: SKILL.md includes instructions for when scripts/gen-design-index.sh does not exist in the project

assertions.name: pipe-escaped-in-table
assertions.description: gen-design-index.sh escapes | characters in description/title/note fields so index.md table renders correctly
